creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Bernard Spil from comment #3)
> The libgdbm dep is indirect, it comes from devel/apr1. 
I already found that it add to LIBS result from "apu-1-config --libs", for example from one my host:  -ldb-18.1 -lgdbm  -lexpat.
But I can't find way how to transform this output to:
USES+=bdb:18
LIB_DEPENDS+=libgdbm.so:databases/gdbm
and etc.
